prestazioni: Engine: N63B44O3 (4.4L V8 Twin-Turbo, Alpina-tuned) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with **Garrett GTX4274R** turbos (hybrid billet wheels, 64mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with **Alpina-specific BorgWarner EVO 2** turbo manifolds (3.5mm wall thickness, Inconel 625 material) for optimized exhaust gas flow and reduced backpressure. Supporting mods include **Forge Motorsport** silicone charge pipes (4-ply aramid-reinforced) and a **Wagner Tuning Competition** intercooler (1000hp-rated, 4.5L core volume) to maintain intake temps below 40°C under full boost (1.5 bar peak).

Fuel System: **Alpina B7-specific** **Bosch Motorsport** 1,200cc port injectors (PN: 0 280 158 123) paired with **AEM 2200cc** high-flow fuel pumps (dual setup) and a **Radium Engineering** fuel pressure regulator (adjustable base pressure to 5.5 bar). ECU recalibration via **Alpina’s proprietary TCU/ECU flash** (developed by **Schrick** in collaboration with Alpina) to optimize AFR (11.8:1 under WOT) and ignition timing (12° BTDC at peak torque).

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP76 XShift** transmission with **Alpina’s reinforced torque converter** (stator modified for 1,200 Nm capacity) and **South Bend Clutch** twin-disc setup (ceramic-metallic, 1,500 Nm rating) for the **G07/G12 chassis-specific** xDrive system. Differential upgraded with **Wavetrac ATB** (Alpina B7-specific 3.15:1 ratio) and **Drexler Motorsport** 2-way LSD (90% lock under load). Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track** coilovers (Alpina B7-specific valving, 20mm adjustable ride height) and **H&R** 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars (solid-mounted, adjustable stiffness).
estetica: Aero: **Alpina B7 BiTurbo (F01/F02) widebody conversion kit** by **Prior Design** (carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders, integrated air curtains) paired with **AC Schnitzer** front splitter (3D-molded, 45mm overhang) and **Vorsteiner** GTS5-style rear diffuser (carbon fiber, dual-plane design with integrated exhaust cutouts). Roof spoiler replaced with **Alpina’s OEM carbon fiber** unit (matte finish, 30mm taller than stock for improved rear downforce).

Wheels: **Alpina Classic 21"** (21x9.5 ET35 front, 21x11 ET45 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/30 R21 front, 315/25 R21 rear) or **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** for track use. Optional **BBS FI-R** (forged, 20x10 ET30 front / 20x12 ET40 rear) with **Hankook Ventus R-S4** semi-slick tires (285/30 R20 front, 325/25 R20 rear) for motorsport applications.

Exterior/Interior: **Alpina B7-specific** **LuxuryTec** full leather retrim (Merino extended Nappa, contrast stitching in **Alpina Blue II** or **Dolomite Silver Metallic**). **M Performance** carbon fiber mirror caps (painted to match body) and **AC Schnitzer** titanium exhaust tips (dual 100mm outlets, quad-bridge design). Interior upgrades include **Alpina’s OEM** **Pirelli P Zero** floor mats (embroidered logo), **Recaro Pole Position** seats (Alcantara/leather, 6-point harness cutouts), and **Alpina B7 BiTurbo** **MOMO** steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip, Alpina crest).
